verses.text: Tua hun laitakin Galilee gamsungteng a uksawn kumpi Herod in Jesuh' thu a za hi
Amah in a nuai-a uliante kiangah, “Hihpa pen Johan hi a, sihna panin a hingkik hi ding hi. Tua ahih manin hih bang na lamdang bawlna ding vangliatna nei hi ding hi,” a ci hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Herod in a nau Filip' zi Herodias a ten'pihna hangin Johan in Herod kiangah, “Na naupa' zi na ten'pih ding ngeina hilo hi,” ci-in gen zelzel ahih manin Herod a heh suak a, Johan mansakin, khau khihsakin, thong sungah a khumsak hi
Herod in Johan that nuam hi. Ahi zongin mite in kamsangin ngaihsun uh ahih manin mite a kihtakna hangin thatsak ngamlo hi
Ahi zongin Herod' suah ni pawi bawl hun hong tun' ciangin mihonte mai-ah Herodias' tanu hong laam ciangin Herod lungdam mahmah ahih manin
“Na hong nget peuhpeuh ka hong pia ding hi,” ci-in a kiciam hi
Tua numei in zong a nu' ngaihsut piakna zui-in, “Kuangdai khat sungah Tuiphumpa Johan' lutang, hih lai mahmahah hong pia in,” ci-in a ngen hi
Kumpipa dah mahmah hi. Ahi zongin a kiciamnasa ahihna hang leh a leenglate' maitang a zahtakna hangin a ngetna a kipiakna dingin thu a pia hi
Tua ahih manin mi sawlin thongah Johan' lutang a tansak hi
Kuangdai khat tawh tua a lutang hong kipaipihin numei kiangah kipia a, tua numei in a nu kiangah a paipih hi
Tua ciangin Johan' nungzuite hong pai uh a, a luang la-in a vui khit uh ciangin Jesuh kiangah hih thu a ko uh hi.

Jesuh in tua thu a zak ciangin tua mun panin kihemkhia-in gamdaihna mun a zuan dingin gunkuang tawh a pai hi. Mite in ama paikhiatna thu a theih uh ciangin a khua ciat panun lei lam tawnin Jesuh nung hong zui uh hi
Tui gei-ah Jesuh a tun' ciangin mihon tampi a na om a mu hi. Amaute hehpihhuai sa a, a cinate a damsak hi
Ni a tum kuan ciangin nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Hih lai mun gamlak hi a, ni zong tum dektak ta hi. Hih kimnai-a om khuate-ah mite va pai-in a an ding uh a leina dingun sawlkhia in,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Amaute a paikhiat ding kisamlo hi. Amaute' nek ding bangkhat peuhpeuh pia un,” ci-in a dawn' ciangin
amaute in, “Anlum nga leh ngasa tawn nih lobuang bangmah dang omlo hi,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in, “Tuate hong paipih un,” ci-in a sawl khit ciangin

lopa tungah mihonte a tutna dingun a sawl hi. Tua ciangin anlum nga leh ngasa tawn nih la-in vantung lam ento a, Pasian tungah a lungdamna a ko hi. Tua ciangin anlum balnenin a nungzuite pia a, a nungzuite in mihonte mai-ah a lui uh hi
Mi khempeuh in ne-in a kham khit uh ciangin a khamvalte uh khawmkik uh a, paipel sawmlenih a dim hi
Tua an a ne mite, numei leh naupang simloh, pasal cingteng mi tul nga bang a pha hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in mihonpite a ciahsak laitakin a nungzuite gunkuangah tuangsak a, tuili gal khatah a pai dingin ama mai-ah a ma paisak hi
Mihonte a ciah khit ciangin thungen dingin mual tunglamah a paito hi. Khuamial ciangin Jesuh guakbek gamlakah om a
ahi zongin nungzuite pen lei tawh gamlapi kihal khinta uh a, huih in amaute lehmut ahih manin gunkuang a kilokgawp hi
Zingsang lam nai thum leh nai guk kikal khawng ciangin a nungzuite kiang lam manawhin tui tungah Jesuh hong pai hi
Ahi zongin nungzuite in tui tungah hong pai a muh uh ciangin lau mahmah uh a, “Sikha hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a lau manun a awng uh hi
Jesuh in amaute hopihpah a, “Na lungsim uh hangsak un. Keimah ka hi hi. Lau kei un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, nang na hihtakpi leh, tui tung tawnin nang kiangah kei zong hong paisak in,” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Hong pai in,” a cih ciangin Peter zong gunkuang tung panin kumkhia a, Jesuh' omna lam manawhin tui tungah a pai hi
Ahi zongin huihpi nung a muh ciangin lau a, tui sungah tum dektak ahih manin, “Topa aw, hong hon in,” a ci hi
Jesuh in zong a khut tawh Peter zamin len a, “Upna cingtaak lopa aw, bang ci-a hong tuaci muan'lah na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Gunkuang tungah a kahtoh khit uh ciangin huihpi nung a dai hi
Tua ciangin gunkuang sungah a om nungzuite in Jesuh bia uh a, “Pasian' Tapa taktak na hi hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Gennesaret gamah Jesuh in Cina Damsak

verses.text: Tui a kantan khit uh ciangin Gennesaret gamah a tung uh hi
Tua gam mite in Jesuh ahihlam a theih uh ciangin tua gam kiim khempeuhah thu zasak uh a, cina khempeuh Jesuh kiangah a hong paipih uh hi
Ama puanmongteep beek a lawn'khak theihna dingun Jesuh kiangah ngen uh a, a puanmongteep a lawng mi khempeuh in damna a ngah uh hi.
